scope: Requalification of the unchanged wall-claim verifier only within metadata-bearing synthetic packs; no domain expansion claim is permitted.

forbidden: CubiCasa val-B and every val-B cell/artifact
read_boundary.enforcement: canonical absolute-path allowlist checked before every harness read; forbidden-path probes are rejection-only and never opened

family_firewall.ranking_rule: ascending SHA-256 of UTF-8 g1_verifier_families|20260719|family_id|family_template_sha256; first five reward, last three hidden
family_firewall.hidden_open_rule: No hidden truth or DXF is parsed and no hidden verifier outcome is computed until the immutable configuration-freeze event is recorded after the reward phase. Hash-only source-integrity reads are allowed before freeze.

verifier_configuration.selection: current verifier defaults, no sweep, tuning, calibration, or outcome-dependent fallback

bands.wording: FAR <= 0.01 AND FRR <= 0.05, with reward-family/hidden-family firewall, family-hash separation, and the band maintained on hidden families
bands.verdict_authority: orchestrator only; cell outputs numeric measurements and no PASS/FAIL qualification verdict

battery.compact_ir_rule: Per drawing, include DXF-derived geometry for every truth-ledger handle and one deterministic non-wall, non-wallish-layer representative of each of the 13 raw entity types. The verifier receives geometry/layer/kind only and never receives truth labels.

geometry_policy.LWPOLYLINE: successive edges plus closing edge when closed
geometry_policy.ARC: chords at no more than 7.5 degrees
geometry_policy.HATCH: ordered boundary vertices when present; otherwise a deterministic 1-unit marker at the first available point
geometry_policy.INSERT: deterministic 1-unit orientation marker at insertion point; block contents are not expanded
geometry_policy.MTEXT: baseline marker from insertion, height, and direction/rotation
geometry_policy.SPLINE: successive control points, else fit-point chain, else deterministic marker
geometry_policy.TEXT: baseline marker from insertion, height, and rotation
geometry_policy.WIPEOUT: successive clip-boundary edges plus closing edge; otherwise deterministic marker

positive_claim_rules: 13 true_exact entity-context cases per drawing: exact truth wall handle set, one case ID per entity type
1 label_poisoned_true case per drawing: invert every SEG-IR label relative to truth while keeping the exact truth claim
false_claim_rules: 13 entity_add cases per drawing: exact truth set plus the deterministic representative handle of that entity type
wall_remove_single: remove one seed-ranked truth handle
wall_remove_pair: remove every handle of one seed-ranked truth wall
lure_add: add the seed-ranked negative handle with maximal qualifying-pair support
neighbor_swap: replace the selected truth handle with the nearest negative handle by centroid
pair_swap: replace the selected truth wall pair with a seed-ranked qualifying negative pair; if none exists, use the seed-ranked two-negative fallback and record the fallback
orphan_add: add a seed-ranked negative handle with zero qualifying support; if none exists, use minimum-support fallback and record the fallback
battery.failure_ledger: exhaustive: every accepted false claim and rejected true claim records case_id, family, drawing, tier, entity/perturbation, verifier reason codes, and harness cause

budget.accounting: time.process_time across selftest and measurement invocations recorded separately and summed in results
budget.kill_rule: stop before the next case once cumulative measured CPU exceeds the cap and record BUDGET_KILL without a qualification verdict

execution_order: validate both seals and all input hashes
record immutable configuration freeze SHA and reward completion event
revalidate input hashes and emit numeric artifacts
dependencies: openpyxl only for evidence.xlsx as explicitly permitted by the packet
reproducibility_claim_wording: 휘발 필드 제외 수치 전 필드 동일
